title: GET /healthz — enriched response (011)
description: Adds worker_count, queue_depth, oldest_pending_age_seconds to existing /healthz response

worker_count.description: Number of active mission worker coroutines

queue_depth.description: Number of triggers matched=true with processed_at IS NULL (pending + in-flight)

oldest_pending_age_seconds.description: Age in seconds of the oldest unprocessed trigger. null if queue is empty.
